# kUSBInformationDevicePortIsInTestModeBit

**Enumeration Case**

The hub port that the USB device attaches to is in test mode.

## Declaration

```swift
kUSBInformationDevicePortIsInTestModeBit = 8
```
title: kUSBInformationDevicePortIsInTestModeBit
